# libredash dashboards

Inspect dashboards

## Usage

```sh
libredash dashboards
```

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash components`: List dashboard page components
- `libredash describe`: Describe a dashboard
- `libredash filter-options`: List dashboard filter options
- `libredash list`: List dashboards
- `libredash query-page`: Query a dashboard page
- `libredash query-table`: Query a dashboard table
- `libredash table-data`: Query dashboard table data
- `libredash visual`: Describe a dashboard visual
- `libredash visual-data`: Query dashboard visual data
